# Frenet Frame

Road-aligned planning that samples trajectories in longitudinal and lateral coordinates along a reference line.

<div class="algorithm-meta">
  <span>Planning</span>
  <span>road planning, curvilinear coordinates, trajectory generation</span>
  <span>Mermaid</span>
</div>

## Flowchart

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A[Project ego state onto reference line] --> B[Convert pose to Frenet s and d]
    B --> C[Sample longitudinal profiles]
    C --> D[Sample lateral offsets]
    D --> E[Combine candidate trajectories]
    E --> F[Convert candidates back to Cartesian]
    F --> G[Check collision, curvature, and comfort]
    G --> H{Valid candidate exists?}
    H -- No --> C
    H -- Yes --> I[Score and select best trajectory]
```


## Notes

- Frenet coordinates decouple progress along the road from lateral offset.
- Candidate trajectories are usually scored on safety, comfort, and progress.
